finding_results.notes: Compressed the school-photo coda so the photo appears briefly, Damian lingers only long enough to preserve the setup beat, and the chapter exits on the water-damaged, illegible name instead of extended recognition processing or post-coda wrap-up.

summary: Compressed the ending after Donovan's call so the Eden class photo remains as a light setup, but the chapter now closes on the damaged name instead of reiterating Damian's near-recognition.
